headline: Assessing Aecon Group (TSX:ARE) Valuation After Its Recent 90 Day Share Price Momentum
summary: Why Aecon Group Is on Investors’ Radar Right Now Aecon Group (TSX:ARE) has drawn fresh attention after a strong run in its share price over the past 3 months, putting its recent returns and current valuation metrics in sharper focus for investors. See our latest analysis for Aecon Group. At a share price of CA$41.79, Aecon Group has cooled slightly in the past week but still carries strong momentum, with a 30.15% 90 day share price return and a very large 1 year total shareholder return,...

headline: Does Aecon’s Discounted CA$150 Million Share Issue Shift The Bull Case For Aecon Group (TSX:ARE)?
summary: In late March 2026, Aecon Group Inc. completed a follow-on equity offering of CA$150.0135 million, issuing 3,822,000 common shares at CA$39.25 each, a CA$1.57 discount per share. This sizeable capital raise reshapes Aecon’s balance sheet and ownership base, with potential implications for funding future projects and managing financial flexibility. Next, we’ll examine how Aecon’s CA$150.0135 million follow-on offering, completed at a discounted share price, may influence its investment...

headline: Conflict Without Closure
summary: U.S. stocks slide into correction as Iran conflict fuels volatility, energy jitters, and rising rates hit REITs.
